// Overtinked: Reading order: every // key is documentation; the following keys are real settings in the same order. Nested objects use // lines first, then values.
// MaxTries: Max number of tinkers allowed per item (recipe check uses MaxTries - 1).
// Scale: Difficulty step between each extra tinker tier.
// MaxImbueEffects: Max imbue effects allowed on an item (checked via bit count of ImbuedEffect).
// EnableRecipeManagerPatch: When true, patches RecipeManager.UseObjectOnTarget (and related) for tinkering flow.
// SalvageRules: Per-salvage tinker rules (random or fixed). Include both WCIDs for quest-reward pairs.
// EnableFailureRedesign: When true, failed tinkers apply the opposite effect instead of destroying the item.
// EnableDefaultImbueFailureWorkmanship: When true, failed imbue tinkers add +1 Workmanship instead of destroying the item, capped at 10.
// BleedImbue: Bleed imbue (e.g. Serpentine 21075). Inside: // lines first, then values.
// BuffedImbueRules: Buffed jewelry imbues. Each array element: // keys first, then values.
// ShowPlayerSalvageMessage: When true, send the player a short message when a custom salvage/imbue is applied.
// EnableLesserImbueUpgradeToFull: Strip weaker effects before imbue: IgnoreArmor (armor cleaving) for Sunstone; CriticalFrequency (biting strike) for Black Opal; CriticalMultiplier (crushing-style) for Fire Opal; ResistanceModifier* for matching rending salvage.
// EnableQuestItemInventoryInit: When true, run quest-item workmanship/initial effects on TryAddToInventory (loot, etc.). Default false; tinkering uses RecipeManager only.
// EnableQuestItemWorkmanship: Only if EnableQuestItemInventoryInit: roll workmanship on first pack add.
// EnableQuestItemInitialEffects: Only if EnableQuestItemInventoryInit: roll initial imbue/slayer/salvage perks on first add.
// QuestItemWorkmanshipMin: Minimum workmanship rolled for quest items.
// QuestItemWorkmanshipMax: Maximum workmanship rolled for quest items.
// QuestItemEffects: Global knobs for initial quest-item effects.

SalvageRules.// Wcids: Both normal and quest-reward WCIDs so behavior is consistent.
SalvageRules.// EffectKind: Kind of effect: Damage, ArmorLevel, etc.
SalvageRules.// MinValue: Random range low (inclusive). Ignored if FixedValue is set.
SalvageRules.// FixedValue: If set, use this value instead of rolling.
SalvageRules.// Enabled: When false, this salvage rule is skipped.
SalvageRules.Name: Iron

BleedImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue.
BleedImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
BleedImbue.Name: Bleed

CleavingImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue.
CleavingImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
CleavingImbue.// SplashDamageFraction: Portion of primary hit damage per splash target.
CleavingImbue.// MaxSplashTargets: Cap on extra targets per swing.
CleavingImbue.// SplashDamagePlayerVictims: When false, cleave never damages players.
CleavingImbue.// SplashDamageCapPerTarget: Cap raw splash damage per target; 0 = no cap.
CleavingImbue.Name: Cleaving

NetherRendingImbue.// SalvageWcids: Salvage WCIDs that apply this imbue.
NetherRendingImbue.// Enabled: When false, this imbue type is disabled.
NetherRendingImbue.// NetherDamageFraction: Portion of primary final damage as Nether.
NetherRendingImbue.// MaxNetherBonusDamage: Cap Nether bonus per swing; 0 = no cap.
NetherRendingImbue.// NetherBonusSoftCap: Soft cap on Nether bonus; 0 = none.
NetherRendingImbue.Name: Nether Rending
